examples.title: VAE Training Loop
examples.code:
FOR epoch IN epochs:
    x ~ p_data
    μ, σ = encoder(x)
    ε ~ N(0,I)
    z = μ + σ*ε
    x̂ = decoder(z)
    loss = ||x - x̂||² + D_KL(N(μ,σ²)||N(0,I))
    UPDATE parameters
examples.explanation: Shows sampling via reparameterization and loss calculation
